brain.label: Static portfolio guide active on free hosting with no AWS runtime dependency.

githubActivity.name: ReceiptPulse
githubActivity.note: I built ReceiptPulse as an AWS receipt workspace where each signed-in user can upload receipts, extract structured fields, resolve duplicates, and manage results. Designed to reduce manual expense tracking time by 80%.

githubActivity.name: LumenStack-AI

projects.title: ReceiptPulse
projects.summary: I built ReceiptPulse as an AWS receipt workspace where each signed-in user can upload receipts, extract structured fields, resolve duplicates, and manage results. Designed to reduce manual expense tracking time by 80%.
projects.proof: This project proves event-driven AWS architecture, private user-scoped product flow, extraction workflows, review tooling, and product-grade dashboard delivery.
details: Built a full upload-to-insight pipeline around private per-user receipt processing.
Added sign-up/sign-in, receipt-only validation, duplicate decision handling, and analytics.
Pushed it beyond a backend demo by building a real dashboard flow around uploads, history, and stored results.
architecture: Signed-in users get a private workspace through Cognito-backed auth.
Receipt uploads land in user-scoped S3 paths.
Lambda processes files, validates them, and calls Textract.
The data is normalized, categorized, labeled, and stored in DynamoDB.
The dashboard code is versioned with the repo so the product flow remains inspectable.
projects.tradeoff: I optimized for a believable product-style AWS build with strong user flow first; deeper reporting and a portable redeploy path are the next layer.

projects.title: LumenStack AI
projects.summary: I built LumenStack AI as a codebase architecture analyzer that parses repositories, detects structure, and generates Mermaid diagrams with guided explanations.
projects.proof: This project proves backend analysis flow, AI-assisted explanation, project framing, and multi-page product design.
details: I accept repos or uploads and turn them into structured architecture summaries.
I added diagram generation, compare mode, chat, and exports.
I designed it to make unfamiliar codebases easier to understand quickly.
architecture: Repository input is parsed file by file.
Manifest and import patterns are used to infer dependency structure.
A structured analysis layer feeds diagrams and AI explanations.
The frontend presents the output as a guided developer product.
projects.tradeoff: I balanced deterministic analysis with AI explanation so the tool stays useful without relying blindly on the model.

learningLog.title: Operating a static-safe portfolio OS
learningLog.note: I am actively maintaining committed project snapshots, branding assets, and project storytelling so live proof stays accurate without unsafe browser-side API calls.

learningLog.title: Making systems feel product-grade
learningLog.note: I am tightening AWS, AI, and frontend projects so each one feels like a production-style product, not a disconnected demo.

learningLog.title: Using motion with stronger visual hierarchy
learningLog.note: I am learning how motion, depth, and contrast can improve comprehension while still keeping technical clarity.

learningLog.title: Keeping repos and portfolio aligned
learningLog.note: I am using manifest-driven updates so future project changes reflect in the portfolio with less manual rework.

ideaInbox.label: ReceiptPulse Reporting Layer
ideaInbox.note: Expand analytics depth, category insights, and decision tooling so the product reads as stronger operations software.

ideaInbox.label: Static Brand Snapshot
ideaInbox.note: Keep manifest logos, accents, and project metadata reflected in portfolio cards with minimal manual maintenance.

ideaInbox.label: Production Deploy Track
ideaInbox.note: Keep improving CI/CD, observability, and deployment confidence for flagship systems.

roadmap.title: Keep flagship products release-ready
roadmap.note: Maintain ReceiptPulse and LumenStack AI with stronger reliability, clearer proof layers, and cleaner production polish.

roadmap.title: Keep portfolio proof truly repo-driven
roadmap.note: Continue aligning manifests, branding assets, and committed snapshots so project cards, logos, themes, and resume links stay current.

roadmap.title: Scale production discipline
roadmap.note: Push stronger CI/CD checks, observability, and deployment hygiene across the most important public projects.
